sections.paragraph:
Original: בּצלית בּצלוּת

Transliteration: batslûth batslı̂yth

Phonetic: bats-looth'

BDB Definition:

Bazlith or Bazluth = "asking"
  1. a head of a family of exiles returning with Zerubbabel

Origin: from the same as H1211

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
